recommendations.title: The Woman in Black

recommendations.title: Speak No Evil
recommendations.overview: A Danish family visits a Dutch family they met on a holiday. What was supposed to be an idyllic weekend slowly starts unraveling as the Danes try to stay polite in the face of unpleasantness.

recommendations.title: Close
recommendations.overview: Two 13-year-old boys spend an idyllic summer together, but their connection is put to the test when they become the subject of speculation at school.

recommendations.title: No One Gets Out Alive
recommendations.overview: An immigrant in search of the American dream is forced to take a room in a boarding house and soon finds herself in a nightmare from which she can't escape.

recommendations.title: Green Street Hooligans

recommendations.title: An Affair to Die For
recommendations.overview: A weekend get-away for two lovers turns into a nightmare of psychological mind games when their infidelity is discovered.
